• Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated maps and real-time synchronization.
  • Features include vehicle upgrades, inventory management, chat system, and admin controls for server management.
  • Players can mine various ores, build structures, and trade with others in a persistent online world.
  • Cloud save system allows cross-device progress synchronization through Puter integration.
  • Mobile controls and customizable keybindings provide flexible input options across devices.
    const GameEngine = class {
      constructor() { this.running = false; this.localPlayer = {...}; }
      async init() { this.settings.username = $('start-username').value; Network.connect(); }
      loop() { this.update(); this.draw(); requestAnimationFrame(() => this.loop()); }

Mega Miner NG is an online multiplayer mining simulation game featuring procedurally generated worlds, real-time synchronization, and extensive upgrade systems. Players control mining vehicles to extract resources, build structures, and trade with others while managing fuel, hull integrity, and cargo capacity. The game includes admin controls for server management, cloud save functionality for cross-device progress, and customizable input options for both desktop and mobile platforms.
